titles.title: You have won the victor’s crown

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You have won the victor’s crown You have triumphed over sin and death Your Name is lifted high and rings Through all the earth Every demon spirit in hell Always trembles when Your name is heard And we Your church Enforce that victory in the world

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: O the glory of Your Name The splendour of Your Name None can compare with the power of that Name You are Jesus You are Lord You are God
